briefdescription.para: This routine sets Baud Rate Prescaler value in Arbitration Phse.

detaileddescription.para: The system clock for the CAN controller is divided by (Prescaler + 1) to generate the quantum clock needed for sampling and synchronization. Read the device specification for details.
Baud Rate Prescaler could be set only after CAN device entered Configuration Mode. So please call XCanFd_EnterMode() to enter Configuration Mode before using this function.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCanFd instance to be worked on.
is the value to set. Valid values are from 0 to 255.

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS if the Baud Rate Prescaler value is set successfully.
XST_FAILURE if CAN device is not in Configuration Mode.
None.

briefdescription.para: This routine gets Baud Rate Prescaler value.

detaileddescription.para: The system clock for the CAN controller is divided by (Prescaler + 1) to generate the quantum clock needed for sampling and synchronization. Read the device specification for details.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCanFd instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: Current used Baud Rate Prescaler value. The value's range is from 0 to 255.
None.

memberdef.argsstring: (XCanFd *InstancePtr, u8 SyncJumpWidth, u8 TimeSegment2, u16 TimeSegment1)
memberdef.name: XCanFd_SetBitTiming

detaileddescription.para: Time segment 1, Time segment 2 and Synchronization Jump Width are set in this function. Device specification requires the values passed into this function be one less than the actual values of these fields. Read the device specification for details.
Bit time could be set only after CAN device entered Configuration Mode. Please call XCanFd_EnterMode() to enter Configuration Mode before using this function.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCanFd instance to be worked on.
is the Synchronization Jump Width value to set. Valid values are from 0 to 3.
is the Time Segment 2 value to set. Valid values are from 0 to 7.
is the Time Segment 1 value to set. Valid values are from 0 to 15.

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS if the Bit time is set successfully.
XST_FAILURE if CAN device is not in Configuration Mode.
XST_INVALID_PARAM if any value of SyncJumpWidth, TimeSegment2 and TimeSegment1 is invalid.
None.

detaileddescription.para: Time segment 1, Time segment 2 and Synchronization Jump Width values are read in this function. According to device specification, the actual value of each of these fields is one more than the value read. Read the device specification for details.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCanFd instance to be worked on.
will store the Synchronization Jump Width value after this function returns. Its value ranges from 0 to 3.
will store the Time Segment 2 value after this function returns. Its value ranges from 0 to 7.
will store the Time Segment 1 value after this function returns. Its value ranges from 0 to 15.

simplesect.para: None.
None.

briefdescription.para: This routine sets Baud Rate Prescaler value in Data Phase.

detaileddescription.para: The system clock for the CAN controller is divided by (Prescaler + 1) to generate the quantum clock needed for sampling and synchronization. Read the device specification for details.
Baud Rate Prescaler could be set only after CAN device entered Configuration Mode. So please call XCanFd_EnterMode() to enter Configuration Mode before using this function.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCanFd instance to be worked on.
is the value to set. Valid values are from 1 to 256.

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS if the Baud Rate Prescaler value is set successfully.
XST_FAILURE if CAN device is not in Configuration Mode.
None.

briefdescription.para: This routine gets Baud Rate Prescaler value in Data Phase.

detaileddescription.para: The system clock for the CAN controller is divided by (Prescaler + 1) to generate the quantum clock needed for sampling and synchronization. Read the device specification for details.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCanFd instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: Current used Baud Rate Prescaler value. The value's range is from 1 to 256.
None.

memberdef.argsstring: (XCanFd *InstancePtr, u8 SyncJumpWidth, u8 TimeSegment2, u8 TimeSegment1)
memberdef.name: XCanFd_SetFBitTiming

briefdescription.para: This routine sets Bit time in Data Phase.

detaileddescription.para: Time segment 1, Time segment 2 and Synchronization Jump Width are set in this function. Device specification requires the values passed into this function be one less than the actual values of these fields. Read the device specification for details.
Bit time could be set only after CAN device entered Configuration Mode. Please call XCanFd_EnterMode() to enter Configuration Mode before using this function.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCanFd instance to be worked on.
is the Synchronization Jump Width value to set. Valid values are from 0 to 3.
is the Time Segment 2 value to set. Valid values are from 0 to 7.
is the Time Segment 1 value to set. Valid values are from 0 to 15.

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS if the Bit time is set successfully.
XST_FAILURE if CAN device is not in Configuration Mode.
XST_INVALID_PARAM if any value of SyncJumpWidth, TimeSegment2 and TimeSegment1 is invalid.
None.

briefdescription.para: This routine gets Bit time in Data Phase.

detaileddescription.para: Time segment 1, Time segment 2 and Synchronization Jump Width values are read in this function. According to device specification, the actual value of each of these fields is one more than the value read. Read the device specification for details.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCanFd instance to be worked on.
will store the Synchronization Jump Width value after this function returns. Its value ranges from 0 to 3.
will store the Time Segment 2 value after this function returns. Its value ranges from 0 to 7.
will store the Time Segment 1 value after this function returns. Its value ranges from 0 to 15.

simplesect.para: None.
None.

briefdescription.para: This routine sets the Bit Rate Switch with nominal bit rate.

detaileddescription.para: if we set BRSD bit in Mode Select Register then CAN Controller transmits CAN FD Frames with Nominal Bit Rate. Read the device specification for details.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCanFd instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: None.
None.

briefdescription.para: This routine Disables the BRSD bit, so that Bit Rate Switch can be happen with Nominal or configured rate.

detaileddescription.para: Read the device specification for details.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCanFd instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: None.
if we set BRSD bit in Mode Select Register then CAN Controller transmits CAN FD Frames with Nominal Bit Rate. else with configured bit rate(As specified in Data phase BRPR and BTR Registers.

briefdescription.para: This routine sets the Rx Full threshold in the Watermark Interrupt Register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCanFd instance.
is the threshold to be set. The valid values are from 1 to 63.

simplesect.para:
- XST_FAILURE - If the CAN device is not in Configuration Mode.
XST_SUCCESS - If the Rx Full threshold is set in Watermark Interrupt Register.
The threshold can only be set when the CAN device is in the configuration mode.

briefdescription.para: This routine sets the Rx Full threshold in the Watermark Interrupt Register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCanFd instance.
is the threshold to be set. The valid values are from 1 to 63.

simplesect.para:
- XST_FAILURE - If the CAN device is not in Configuration Mode.
XST_SUCCESS - If the Rx Full threshold is set in Watermark Interrupt Register.
The threshold can only be set when the CAN device is in the configuration mode.This API is meant to be used with IP with CanFD 2.0 spec support only.

briefdescription.para: This routine sets the TX Events Full threshold in the Watermark Interrupt Register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCanFd instance.
is the threshold to be set. The valid values are from 1 to 31.

simplesect.para:
- XST_FAILURE - If the CAN device is not in Configuration Mode.
XST_SUCCESS - If the Rx Full threshold is set in Watermark Interrupt Register.
The threshold can only be set when the CAN device is in the configuration mode, This API is meant to be used with IP with CanFD 2.0 spec support only.

briefdescription.para: This routine sets the Receive filter partition in the Watermark Interrupt Register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XCanFd instance.
is Filter Mask number, valid values are 0 to 31.

simplesect.para:
- XST_FAILURE - If the CAN device is not in Configuration Mode.
XST_SUCCESS - If the Rx Full threshold is set in Watermark Interrupt Register.
The RX filter partition can only be set when the CAN device is in the configuration mode, This API is meant to be used with IP with CanFD 2.0 spec support only.
